votes.reason: The Python code correctly implements the factorial, sum_to_n, and f_spec functions, matching the logic and sequence generation of the Coq specification.
The Python implementation correctly replicates the Coq logic for factorial, sum_to_n, and the conditional mapping over the sequence [1, ..., n].
The Python code correctly implements the factorial and sum_to_n functions, and accurately reproduces the Coq specification by mapping the appropriate function over the sequence from 1 to n.

The Python code correctly implements factorial, sum_to_n, and f_spec. It generates the same sequence as Coq's `seq 1 n` (i.e., [1, 2, ..., n]), applies factorial for even indices and sum_to_n for odd indices (matching Coq's Nat.even), and checks equality of the result list against the expected list.

The Python code correctly implements factorial, sum_to_n, and f_spec. The Coq seq 1 n produces [1, 2, ..., n] which matches Python's range(1, n+1). Nat.even checks if a number is even (i % 2 == 0 in Python). For even i, factorial is applied; for odd i, sum_to_n is applied. The Python f_spec returns True iff result equals the expected list, which matches the Coq Prop equality.

The Python code correctly implements factorial and sum_to_n matching the Coq definitions. The f_spec function generates the same expected list: for each i in [1..n], it applies factorial when i is even and sum_to_n when i is odd, matching Coq's Nat.even check. The comparison result == expected correctly reflects whether the Coq Prop would hold.
For all natural n, Python builds [1..n] and applies factorial to even i and sum 1..i to odd i, matching the Coq definitions and Nat.even behavior.
Python computes factorial and sum_to_n identically for nat inputs and builds the same [1..n] sequence, applying the same even/odd choice; list equality check matches Coq’s result = ... specification.
Python computes factorial and sum_to_n identically to Coq and builds the list over [1..n] applying factorial to even i and sum_to_n to odd i; it then checks equality, matching the Coq spec.
